info.title: AgentPowers API
info.description: Paid marketplace for Claude Code skills and agents

post.description: Verify Clerk JWT and return user info.

get.description: Get current user profile.
List published skills with optional filtering and sorting.
Get skill details by slug.

patch.description: Update an existing skill — creates a new version.

post.description:
Upload a skill package file to R2 storage.

Only the skill author can upload packages. Max 100 MB.
When version is specified, uploads to the version-specific storage key.

get.description: Download a skill package. Free skills are public. Paid require purchase.
Download a skill as ZIP for claude.ai web users.

post.description: Unpublish (archive) a skill. Owner-only. Reversible via republish.
Republish a previously archived skill. Owner-only.
Submit an ownership claim for a ClawHub skill.

get.description: List published agents with optional filtering and sorting.
Get agent details by slug.

patch.description: Update an existing agent — creates a new version.

get.description: Download an agent package. Free agents are public. Paid require purchase.

post.description:
Upload an agent package file to R2 storage.

Only the agent author can upload packages. Max 100 MB.
Unpublish (archive) an agent. Owner-only. Reversible via republish.
Republish a previously archived agent. Owner-only.
Initiate a purchase (creates Stripe Checkout session).

get.description:
Look up purchase status by Stripe session ID (post-redirect).

No auth required — Stripe session IDs are unguessable (64+ char random
strings) and act as bearer tokens for the specific checkout. This allows
the Astro SSR success page to confirm purchases without a Clerk JWT.
List current user's purchases.

post.description: Regenerate license code for a purchased skill.

get.description: Poll purchase status.

post.description: Redeem a license code to link purchase to account.

get.description: Full-text search across skills and agents. Returns sectioned results.
Get category index (compact, for plugin injection).
Get single category with skills in that category.
Check claim status. Users can only view their own claims.
List all sellers with published skills.
Check if current user is an onboarded seller (read-only, no side effects).

post.description: Create Stripe Connect account and return onboarding URL.

get.description: Get earnings summary for the current seller.
List current seller's published skills with revenue data.
List recent sales for the current seller's skills.
List payout history for the current seller via Stripe Connect.
Revenue breakdown per skill for the current seller.
Daily revenue timeseries for the past N days.
Activity feed combining installs and purchases for seller's skills.
Get public seller profile by username.
Get a seller's public skills list.

post.description: Record a skill installation for abuse tracking.

get.description: Get stored security scan results for a skill.

Get full detail for a skill by slug.

Tries native DB first, then external sources.
Return current user's profile.

patch.description:
Update current user's profile.

For username: checks uniqueness with case-insensitive comparison.
Returns 409 if username is taken.

get.description: Return current notification preferences. Defaults if no row exists.

patch.description: Upsert notification preferences. Only updates provided fields.

delete.description:
Request account deletion with 30-day grace period.

Requires confirmation string "delete my account".
Returns 409 if blockers exist, 403 if account is held.

schema.title: Response Delete Account V1 Users Me Delete
Response Cancel Account Deletion V1 Users Me Cancel Deletion Post

post.description: Submit a review for a skill. One review per user per skill.

get.description: List reviews for a skill (public, no auth required).
Health check for Railway monitoring.

SecurityResultsResponse.title: SecurityResultsResponse
SecurityResultsResponse.description: Response for retrieving stored scan results.

SecurityScanResponse.title: SecurityScanResponse
SecurityScanResponse.description: Response from triggering a security scan.
